description: Canonical-form vectors (D3): SHA-256 over JCS-compatible serialization (sorted keys, no insignificant whitespace, minimal escaping, UTF-8) of the object minus `annotations`. Pre-normalization rule (D3.3): structurally OPTIONAL arrays/objects with zero elements MUST be absent - their presence is a validation error, so canonicalization never sees them; structurally REQUIRED fields remain even when empty. Decimals are canonical strings (D3.4), never IEEE floats.

vectors.name: empty-omission-optional-array-present-is-error
vectors.reason: structurally optional array `relations` present with zero elements - MUST be omitted before serialization (D3.3; the omitted-vs-empty hash-fragmentation corpse)

vectors.name: empty-omission-required-array-stays
vectors.reason: `members` is structurally REQUIRED on RequirementSet - it remains even when empty; only optional empties are omitted (measured live: the C5 GC domain Set)
